The '''stava''' was a quadruped [[Diet/Legends|carnivore]] on [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]] that had good endurance. It was rendered extinct after the contamination of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] during the [[Battle of Honoghr/Legends|Battle of Honoghr]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="TEGtPaM" />

The native [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] named a [[Stava (skill)|martial art]] after the stava. There was also an expression used by the Noghri about arguments, that something was being fought over like "a bone among hungry ''stava''."

{{Creature-stub}}
